description: Test plan / manifest for the project. Actual test code comes next; this defines what must be covered.

unit.assert: every config JSON loads and validates against its pydantic schema; malformed config fails loudly
redact_patterns remove secrets from any log line and from anything sent to the model
each rule R1..R12 fires on a known-bad snippet and stays silent on a clean one
one high-severity finding yields BLOCK; one medium yields REQUEST_CHANGES; none yields APPROVE

integration.assert: any forbidden_without_human_approval action is refused without approval
subagents receive only their scoped context and share no mutable state
reviewed code cannot make a network call or write outside the temp dir
the verdict is backed by REAL tool output; a faked 'green' cannot pass

evals.assert: run config/evals.json; report precision and recall; fail CI if below threshold

ci: run unit + integration + evals on every push; block merge on failure
